prisma/schema.prisma.content:
// This is your Prisma schema file,
// learn more about it in the docs: https://pris.ly/d/prisma-schema

generator client {
  provider = "prisma-client-js"
}

datasource db {
  provider = "sqlite"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}

// Main anime catalog
model Anime {
  id              String    @id @default(cuid())
  slug            String    @unique
  title           String
  titleEnglish    String?
  titleJapanese   String?
  coverImage      String?
  bannerImage     String?
  description     String?
  year            Int?
  rating          Float?
  status          String    @default("completed") // airing, completed, upcoming
  type            String    @default("anime") // anime, film, ova, special
  episodes        Int       @default(0) // total episodes count
  isClassic       Boolean   @default(false)
  isFeatured      Boolean   @default(false)
  isTrending      Boolean   @default(false)
  isLatest        Boolean   @default(false)
  isVerified      Boolean   @default(false) // Verified via MyAnimeList API
  malId           Int?      // MyAnimeList ID for validation
  genres          String?   // JSON array
  studio          String?
  source          String?   // manga, light novel, original, etc.
  views           Int       @default(0)
  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime  @updatedAt

  seasons         Season[]
  watchHistory    WatchHistory[]

  @@index([status])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([isFeatured])
  @@index([isTrending])
  @@index([isLatest])
  @@index([isVerified])
}

// Seasons for each anime
model Season {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  animeId     String
  number      Int       // Season number (1, 2, 3...)
  title       String?   // e.g., "Season 1" or "Arc Name"
  episodes    Int       @default(0)
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt

  anime        Anime          @relation(fields: [animeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  episodesRel  Episode[]
  watchHistory WatchHistory[]

  @@unique([animeId, number])
  @@index([animeId])
}

// Episodes for each season
model Episode {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  seasonId    String
  number      Int       // Episode number
  title       String?
  description String?
  thumbnail   String?
  duration    Int?      // Duration in minutes
  isFiller    Boolean   @default(false)
  views       Int       @default(0)
  airedAt     DateTime?
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt

  season       Season        @relation(fields: [seasonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  videoSources VideoSource[]
  watchHistory WatchHistory[]

  @@unique([seasonId, number])
  @@index([seasonId])
}

// Video sources for each episode (multi-source support)
model VideoSource {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  episodeId   String
  source      String   // sibnet, vidmoly, sendvid, oneupload, myvi, etc.
  url         String   // Embed URL
  language    String   @default("vostfr") // vostfr, vf
  quality     String   @default("hd") // hd, sd, 1080p, 720p
  isWorking   Boolean  @default(true)
  priority    Int      @default(0) // Higher = better quality/source
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt

  episode Episode @relation(fields: [episodeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([episodeId])
  @@index([source])
  @@index([language])
}

// Watch history for users
model WatchHistory {
  id           String    @id @default(cuid())
  animeId      String
  seasonId     String
  episodeId    String
  progress     Int       @default(0) // seconds watched
  completed    Boolean   @default(false)
  language     String    @default("vostfr")
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime  @updatedAt

  anime   Anime   @relation(fields: [animeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  season  Season  @relation(fields: [seasonId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  episode Episode @relation(fields: [episodeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([animeId])
  @@index([seasonId])
  @@index([episodeId])
}

// Cached data for API responses
model CachedData {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  key       String   @unique
  data      String   // JSON data
  expiresAt DateTime
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

// Version backup system for code recovery
model VersionBackup {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  versionName String   @unique  // e.g., "v1.0-stable"
  description String?           // User-friendly description
  pageTsx     String            // Full content of page.tsx
  routeTs     String            // Full content of api/frivox/route.ts
  anilistTs   String            // Full content of lib/anilist.ts
  isLocked    Boolean  @default(false)  // Prevent accidental deletion
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime @updatedAt
}

// Sync status tracking for automatic updates
model SyncStatus {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  lastSyncAt      DateTime?
  lastFullSyncAt  DateTime?
  status          String   @default("idle") // idle, syncing, error
  errorMessage    String?
  animesUpdated   Int      @default(0)
  episodesAdded   Int      @default(0)
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt
}

package.json.content:
{
  "name": "nextjs_tailwind_shadcn_ts",
  "version": "0.2.0",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev -p 3000 2>&1 | tee dev.log",
    "build": "next build && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/ && cp -r public .next/standalone/",
    "start": "NODE_ENV=production bun .next/standalone/server.js 2>&1 | tee server.log",
    "lint": "eslint .",
    "db:push": "prisma db push",
    "db:generate": "prisma generate",
    "db:migrate": "prisma migrate dev",
    "db:reset": "prisma migrate reset"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1",
    "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0",
    "@dnd-kit/utilities": "^3.2.2",
    "@hookform/resolvers": "^5.1.1",
    "@mdxeditor/editor": "^3.39.1",
    "@prisma/client": "^6.11.1",
    "@radix-ui/react-accordion": "^1.2.11",
    "@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog": "^1.1.14",
    "@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio": "^1.1.7",
    "@radix-ui/react-avatar": "^1.1.10",
    "@radix-ui/react-checkbox": "^1.3.2",
    "@radix-ui/react-collapsible": "^1.1.11",
    "@radix-ui/react-context-menu": "^2.2.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.14",
    "@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu": "^2.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-hover-card": "^1.1.14",
    "@radix-ui/react-label": "^2.1.7",
    "@radix-ui/react-menubar": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu": "^1.2.13",
    "@radix-ui/react-popover": "^1.1.14",
    "@radix-ui/react-progress": "^1.1.7",
    "@radix-ui/react-radio-group": "^1.3.7",
    "@radix-ui/react-scroll-area": "^1.2.9",
    "@radix-ui/react-select": "^2.2.5",
    "@radix-ui/react-separator": "^1.1.7",
    "@radix-ui/react-slider": "^1.3.5",
    "@radix-ui/react-slot": "^1.2.3",
    "@radix-ui/react-switch": "^1.2.5",
    "@radix-ui/react-tabs": "^1.1.12",
    "@radix-ui/react-toast": "^1.2.14",
    "@radix-ui/react-toggle": "^1.1.9",
    "@radix-ui/react-toggle-group": "^1.1.10",
    "@radix-ui/react-tooltip": "^1.2.7",
    "@reactuses/core": "^6.0.5",
    "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.82.0",
    "@tanstack/react-table": "^8.21.3",
    "class-variance-authority": "^0.7.1",
    "clsx": "^2.1.1",
    "cmdk": "^1.1.1",
    "date-fns": "^4.1.0",
    "embla-carousel-react": "^8.6.0",
    "framer-motion": "^12.23.2",
    "hls.js": "^1.6.15",
    "input-otp": "^1.4.2",
    "lucide-react": "^0.525.0",
    "next": "^16.1.1",
    "next-auth": "^4.24.11",
    "next-intl": "^4.3.4",
    "next-themes": "^0.4.6",
    "prisma": "^6.11.1",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-day-picker": "^9.8.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "react-hook-form": "^7.60.0",
    "react-markdown": "^10.1.0",
    "react-resizable-panels": "^3.0.3",
    "react-syntax-highlighter": "^15.6.1",
    "recharts": "^2.15.4",
    "sharp": "^0.34.3",
    "sonner": "^2.0.6",
    "tailwind-merge": "^3.3.1",
    "tailwindcss-animate": "^1.0.7",
    "uuid": "^11.1.0",
    "vaul": "^1.1.2",
    "z-ai-web-dev-sdk": "^0.0.17",
    "zod": "^4.0.2",
    "zustand": "^5.0.6"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@tailwindcss/postcss": "^4",
    "@types/react": "^19",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19",
    "bun-types": "^1.3.4",
    "eslint": "^9",
    "eslint-config-next": "^16.1.1",
    "tailwindcss": "^4",
    "tw-animate-css": "^1.3.5",
    "typescript": "^5"
  }
}
